channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Death Toll from U.S. Boat Strikes Rises After Survivors Not Found
item.description: The death toll from the Trump administration's series of strikes on suspected drug trafficking boats has increased to at least 199 people.

item.title: Pam Bondi to face closed-door questioning from House lawmakers over Epstein files
item.description: Former Attorney General Pam Bondi is appearing before House lawmakers investigating Jeffrey Epstein’s sexual abuse cases

item.title: U.S. and Iran 'not there yet' on a deal but 'very close,' Vance says
item.description: With the Strait of Hormuz still gridlocked and war raging in Lebanon, Iran and the U.S. both say there's no agreement yet.

item.title: Bondi to testify behind closed doors in House Epstein probe today
item.description: Former Attorney General Pam Bondi will testify before the House Oversight Committee on Friday about her handling of the Epstein files.
